text.name: vdt_setting_exportEnabled_tooltip
text.text: Enable or disable writing telemetry to vdTelemetry.json. Disabling also removes the file.

text.name: vdt_setting_writeInterval_tooltip
text.text: How often telemetry is written. Shorter intervals are smoother but write more often.

text.name: vdt_setting_profile_tooltip
text.text: Preset update rates for the secondary channels (map, productions, animals, ...). Higher means more frequent updates and more load. Low also turns the ground-layer map overlays off completely. Fine-tune individual channels from VDTerminal (shown here as Custom).
